original_statement: how many times have the colorado rapids women finished outside of the top 5 teams in the usl w-league western division 1?
mutated_statement: how many times have the named women's team finished outside of the top 5 teams in a given western division 1 while only counting seasons in which they finished inside the top 5?
mutation_analysis: Entity substitution + Division generalization + Logical contradiction: "the colorado rapids women" → "the named women's team" (specific team → vague/anaphoric) | "the usl w-league western division 1" → "a given western division 1" (specific league/division → nonspecific) | Count condition altered to be contradictory: "finished outside of the top 5" → "finished outside of the top 5 ... while only counting seasons in which they finished inside the top 5" (counting outside events but restricting to inside events)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中列出的关键信息（明确指出西部Division 1在2006、2007、2012、2013年为“inside top 5”的赛季，并得出“在仅计入这些赛季时不存在outside top5的情况”），agent已识别出变异问题的自相矛盾性。具体表现为：未报错或直接拒绝，而是用数据与逻辑推理解释矛盾——在只计入“进入前5”的赛季这一限制下，确实没有“未进入前5”的赛季，从而得出0的计数结论。该行为符合“逻辑解释合理化”的定义：通过事实与推理说明矛盾在现有数据下无法成立并据此给出合理化的答案。
